title: mangifera minor
intro: Mangifera minor, also known as the Philippine mango or mango minor, is a species of tree that belongs to the mango family and is native to the Philippines. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mangifera minor include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even show potential in treating cancer and diabetes. Herbal preparations of Mangifera minor can be made by infusing its leaves or bark in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing its extracts with other herbs to create a powder or capsule for medicinal purposes.
